site_api_key.description: Chargebee site API key. Sent as the HTTP Basic username with an empty password; never logged.

base_url.description: Chargebee API base URL, e.g. https://{site}.chargebee.com/api/v2. Required: legacy derives this from a site config value, but that cross-key derivation has no engine mechanism today (see docs.md Known limits), so this bundle requires the fully-formed URL instead.

start_date.description: RFC3339 lower bound; only objects updated at or after this time are read.

max_pages.description: Maximum pages; use 0, all, or unlimited to exhaust the stream.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
